scenario.name: Message No contact
scenario.send:
MESSAGE sip:user1@127.0.0.1:5062 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: user <sip:user@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]bit[call_number] To: user1 <sip:user1@127.0.0.1:5062> Contact: <sip:user@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 MESSAGE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: text/plain Content-Length: 11
Hello World
